character_buff.name: Cure
character_buff.description: Restores HP. It can be used from longer distance than healing skill of Scout.

skills.name: Recover
skills.description: Cure various abnormal disease that might afflict team members.

skills.name: Resuscitation
skills.description: Heals a character who is incapable of combat.

skills.name: Cure All
skills.description: Restores HP of an ally by large amount.

skills.name: Mass Cure
skills.description: Fully recover HP of all team members.

skills.name: Intensify
skills.description: Increases ATK of all team members.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.description: Increases Max HP of all team members. Not applied with [Acceleration] simultaneously.

skills.name: Acceleration
skills.description: Increases Attack/Move SPD of all team members. Not applied with [Fortify] simultaneously.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Increases HP/SP Regen. of all team members.

effects: Remove harmful effect of own character

skills.name: Consolidation
skills.description: Increases penetration rate.

skills.name: Prompt Action
skills.description: Skill casting time of your family decreases.

skills.name: Divine Bless
skills.description: Increases HP and SP regeneration of your family. Regeneration increases with level.

skills.name: Refresh Mind
skills.description: Clear mind of target to remove abnormal status, and reset all cooldowns for current stance.

skills.name: Principal
skills.description: Provide basic buffs to team. The power can be doubled according to the circumstances.

skills.name: Melee Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Melee Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Magic Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Magic Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Shooting Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Shoot Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.description: Cancel darkness type curse on squad members as well as detect invisibility. Increase resistance of darkness type curse for a given time.

skills.name: Depoison
skills.description: Cancel poison and paralysis status of squad members and apply Divine Bless.

skills.name: Deresist
skills.description: Cancel abnormal attribute RES of squad members and apply Divine Bless.

skills.name: Demental
skills.description: Cancel abnormal mental status of squad member and apply Divine Bless.

skills.name: Dephysical
skills.description: Cancel abnormal status of squad members and apply Divine Bless.

skills.name: Demagical
skills.description: Turn the abnormal magical statuses that squad members are afflicted with into a temporary power boost that attempts to shield them from new debuff inflictions.

effects: ATK, Monster Damage and Critical Damage +2%
ATK, Monster Damage and Critical Damage +20%
ATK, Monster Damage and Critical Damage +22%

ATK, Monster Damage and Critical Damage +26%

stances.name: Ancient Tactics

skills.name: Miracle
skills.description: Execute a tactic that increases the offensive and defensive capacity of the ally.

skills.name: Protecting Booster
skills.description: Increase the defensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Shearing Booster
skills.description: Increase the offensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Bartor
skills.description: Remove all harmful effects and restore HP of all team members.

effects: Remove harmful effect of own character
Remove harmful effect of own character

skills.name: Additional Training
skills.description: Increase skill level by enhancing own tactical capacity.

effects: Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.

skills.name: Absolute Protection
skills.description: Enhances the defense abilities of the designated character according to their equipped armor, and ignores a certain number of enemy skill attacks.

effects: Ignores enemy PC skill attacks exceeding current HP (1 time hit through normal attack or skill, buff is removed)
It does not stacks with [Absolute Shield].
If the ally is wearing [Light Armor], 25% reduced damage from magic attacks
If the ally is wearing [Medium Armor], 25% reduced damage from ranged attacks
If the ally is wearing [Heavy Armor], 25% reduced damage from melee attacks
Ignores enemy PC skill attacks exceeding current HP (1 time hit through normal attack or skill, buff is removed)
It does not stacks with [Absolute Shield].
If the ally is wearing [Light Armor], 25% reduced damage from magic attacks
If the ally is wearing [Medium Armor], 25% reduced damage from ranged attacks
If the ally is wearing [Heavy Armor], 25% reduced damage from melee attacks

skills.name: Absolute Shield
skills.description: Grants a shield to the designated ally based on their maximum HP, reducing all incoming skill damage by a fixed amount.

effects: Grants a shield equal to 3% of the target PCs maximum HP
It does not stacks with [Absolute Protection].
Grants a shield equal to 30% of the target PCs maximum HP
It does not stacks with [Absolute Protection].
Grants a shield equal to 33% of the target PCs maximum HP
It does not stacks with [Absolute Protection].
Grants a shield equal to 36% of the target PCs maximum HP
It does not stacks with [Absolute Protection].
Grants a shield equal to 39% of the target PCs maximum HP
It does not stacks with [Absolute Protection].
